theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) infused with vibrant Barbie Pink accents
theme_and_archetype.emotional_tone: Romantic, playful, delightful, intimate, slightly theatrical

motion_and_interactions.drumroll: Use react-native-reanimated for a bouncing, scaling emoji shared value, concluding with a swift scale-out and fade upon password unlock.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Slide-up for bottom sheets; soft fade-and-scale for the storybook cards to feel like turning a physical page.
motion_and_interactions.buttons: Implement a reanimated scale down to 0.95 on press-in, and a soft spring back on press-out to feel tactile and playful.

images.usage: Welcome screen and Drumroll screen immersive background
images.description: Soft elegant Barbie pink and pearl fluid gradient
Minimalist pink leather texture with rose gold hearts

images.usage: Mock image for a previous date memory or polaroid grid
images.description: Two people pose for a polaroid picture

images.usage: Mock image for a dinner stop detail card

icons.style: Feather for clean UI, Ionicons for solid/filled heart shapes

development_rules.styling: Use StyleSheet.create exclusively. No CSS, no Tailwind, no classNames. Apply structural logic tailored for React Native.
development_rules.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `testID` (React Native standard) attribute, which maps to data-testid for automated testing (e.g., testID='login-button').
development_rules.architecture: Use expo-router for file-based navigation. Wrap all main screen content in SafeAreaView to prevent notch collisions.
development_rules.glassmorphism: Use the expo-blur (BlurView) package positioned absolutely (StyleSheet.absoluteFill) to achieve glassmorphism overlays on top of the fluid pink background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the app strictly as an Expo React Native mobile application using .js/.jsx files.
Do not use HTML tags like <div> or Tailwind CSS. Use native components: View, Text, TouchableOpacity, Image, ScrollView, FlatList.
Apply the exact styling constraints defined in this guideline. Emphasize large touch targets (minHeight 56) and generous screen padding (24).
Use the generated fluid gradient image for the background of the Welcome and Drumroll screens via ImageBackground or an absolutely positioned Image.
For the Storybook UI, implement rich shadow effects around the cards and use the provided 'storybook_cover' image for the cover component.
Use Playfair Display (or a standard serif fallback if loading fonts is complex) for primary headings to give the romantic storybook feel, paired with a geometric sans for body.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST have `testID` attributes in kebab-case to satisfy testing requirements.
